ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER'S MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL ATTACHMENTS TO THE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND EXHIBIT 1 TO SUPPORTING DECLARATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED AND ADDED TO THE COURT'S CALENDAR DUE TO A CLERICAL ERROR. PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD OF AMERICA'S CUP EVENT AUTHORITY LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER AMERICA'S CUP EVENT AUTHORITY LLC AND AGAINST RESPONDENT GAMEDAY MERCHANDISING INTERNATIONAL LLC. RESPONDENT SHALL PAY PETITIONER $50,005.82 IN COMPENSATORY DAMAGES. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Under Seal Attachments To The Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Exhibit 1 To Supporting Declaration
Off Calendar Sep-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MEGAN OLIVER THOMPSON OF HANSON BRIDGETT, TEL. NO. 777-3200 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER AMERICAS CUP EVENT AUTHORITY LLC's Motion To File Under Seal Attachments To The Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Exhibit 1 To Supporting Declaration is Granted. (Attachment 4(b)to the Petition, Attachment 8(c)to the Petition and Exhibit 1 to Supporting Declaration of Batya F. Forsyth to be filed under seal) No opposition filed and for good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
